description: Stage2 real Polar.DB experiment based on the legacy manual scenario: load, build, reopen/refresh, random point lookups.

dataset.notes: Persons(id,name,age) generated in reverse id order.

workload.notes: After reopen/refresh execute random point lookups by id.

faultProfile.notes: No fault injection in stage2 first real experiment.

fairnessProfile.notes: Default fairness profile for first real run.
